title: Scale to ≥ 30 reviewed guides across ≥ 3 disciplines × ≥ 3 grade bands
context: The project's Definition of Shipped requires at least 30 safety-reviewed guides across at least 3 disciplines and 3 grade bands. This task extends the first guide set (content-007) to reach that scale, with every new guide going through the same dual-review and dry-run process. Priority disciplines and grade bands should be partner-driven if partner-017 has been completed. Depends on content-007 (the review pipeline must be proven before scaling).
objective: Author and publish additional experiment guides to reach a total of at least 30 published guides spanning at least 3 disciplines (e.g. physics, biology, earth/space, chemistry-safe, general) and at least 3 grade bands. Every guide must conform to the data-003 schema, pass all CI gates, cite only open/PD/CC sources, carry a complete safety block, be dual-reviewed (science + credentialed safety) by reviewers distinct from the author, and be physically dry-run by a second educator before publish.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 30 guides total are published in the repository (including those from content-006 and content-007), spanning at least 3 distinct disciplines and at least 3 distinct grade bands
Each new guide conforms to the data-003 schema and passes all CI gates (schema-validation, exclusion-list, cost-ceiling, readability)
Each new guide cites only open/PD/CC sources with retrieval date and license; no verbatim copying of copyrighted text; only open/PD/CC media
Each new guide carries a complete and accurate safety block including exclusionCheck: 'pass'
Each new guide is runnable within its declared cost ceiling using listed materials and substitutions, with no special lab equipment required
For each new guide: authoredBy, scienceReviewedBy, and safetyApprovedBy are distinct people; the safety approver meets the credential bar
Each new guide is physically dry-run by a second educator; a PR-tied review-log entry is written for each guide
Priority disciplines and grade bands reflect partner input if partner-017 is complete; otherwise cover the broadest feasible spread
output: A series of pull requests expanding the oer-science-labs guide library to at least 30 total guides, each dual-reviewed, dry-run, source-cited, and exclusion-checked, across at least 3 disciplines and 3 grade bands.
